report a suspicious email.
Dear CFPB, HHS, & Treasury Colleagues, 
Attached is my RFI response on Medical Credit Cards, Medical Credit Marketing
material and a screen shot of Small Claims Court Docket. 
I mentioned some people by name in the RFI. 
They are cc'd here for your convenience. 
For more info on Banks, ISO20020 and provider interest in "Faster Payments", I
encourage the parties to connect to Mr Mick Talley, Mr Stephen Ranzani and Mr.
David Repking. 
Please connect with Mr. Guy Berg and Ms. Carolyn Krull with the Federal Reserve in
Chicago.... healthcare is delivered within a monetary policy environment.  
Regarding the IRS Tax Status of Non-For-Profit Hospitals, please speak with Professor
Ge Bai, PhD, CPA and Professor of Accounting at Johns Hopkins Carey Business
School and Professor of Health Policy & Management (joint) at Johns Hopkins
Bloomberg School of Public Health.  
Best regards, 
Kendra
Kendra Wyatt, Chief Executive Officer 
New Birth Company
